description: View types supported by Workfront Planning MCP tools.

viewTypes.description: Spreadsheet-style grid view. Default view type created automatically with every record type.
viewTypes.notes: Every record type gets a default table view. Do NOT create one unless the user wants an additional table view.

viewTypes.description: Gantt-chart / horizontal timeline view for date-based record visualization.
viewTypes.notes: Requires at least one date field on the record type to be useful.

viewTypes.description: Monthly/weekly calendar view for scheduling and date-oriented records.
viewTypes.notes: Requires at least one date field on the record type.
